emails.subject: Re: message from Ken Rice
emails.body: Re: message from Ken Rice Dorothy, No problem. Please, CC-mail me Tom's number. One of the members of the group has a PhD in computer science and he will join me for the call. Vince From: Dorothy Dalton@ENRON COMMUNICATIONS on 05/01/2001 08:53 AM
